arts.ttl: Bayern Munich enter concrete talks with defender despite agreement with Barcelona
arts.sum: Jonathan Tah is set to spark a major transfer war this summer as he nears a departure from Bayer Leverkusen when his contract expires on June 30. The German international has emerged as a top target for FC Barcelona, with the club having been working on a deal for him since last year. However, there […]

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick sends request to Barcelona stars ahead of Real Madrid meeting
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has sent a request the way of his playing squad, regarding their efforts in this weekend’s showdown with Real Madrid. The season’s final Clásico is…
